Title: 55 lbs. Mortar Mix
Body (HTML):
Rapid Set Mortar Mix is a high quality mortar that is suitable for vertical and overhead applications. It is ideal when rapid strength gain, high durability and low shrinkage are desired. Use Mortar Mix for general and structural concrete repair, stucco and plaster repair, 1-coat exterior plaster, mortar beds, underlayment and formed work. Mortar Mix sets in 15-minutes and is ready to drive or build on in 1-hours. Durable in wet environments, it can be applied from 1\2 in. to 6 in. thick. Mortar Mix is a blend of high performance Rapid Set cement with quality sand. Mortar Mix offers superior resistance to chemical attack. It is non-metallic and no chlorides are added. Mortar Mix allows the repair areas to be painted, coated or sealed quickly after application. Under dry conditions, water-based coatings such as latex paint can be applied after the product is hardened, which usually takes 1-hours to 4-hours. Solvent-based and impermeable coatings such as oil based paint and epoxy can be applied in 16-hours.

Title: 656 oz. 200 ft. Insulation Kit Spray Foam Sealant
Body (HTML):
Built for the pros, the HandiFoam FR (HFO) is designed to fill and insulate large voids and surfaces. HandiFoam's excellent adhesion properties create a continuous air barrier which completes the building envelope, resulting in improved indoor air quality and lower heating and cooling costs. Designed to be used with the Handi-Gun and the patented ColorWise Temperature Warning nozzles to effectively seal and insulate projects of all sizes. The ColorWise Temperature Warning nozzles change from clear to blue as a visual indication that the foam is too cold and should not be dispensed until properly conditioned. To avoid off-ratio foam and yield-loss, properly condition the chemical before spraying. This product is formulated utilizing an HFO blowing agent which is part of HandiFoam's ongoing commitment to developing foam chemistries with lower global warming impact and enhanced product performance.HandiFoam is an industry-leading brand that delivers low-pressure one- and two-component polyurethane foam sealants, adhesives, pour-in-place and spray foams. Title: Stratford Feather-Light White 2 ft. x 4 ft. Lay-in Ceiling Panel (Case of 10)
Body (HTML):
Stratford White Feather-Light Ceiling Panels are unlike any ceiling tile you will ever see or feel. When you take them out of the box you will be surprised by the minimal weight of their Feather-Light construction. Ceilume Stratford panels are formed from a thin sheet of vinyl that is only 0.013 in. thick, about the thickness of a business card. But the Stratford's geometric design combined with the inherent strength of vinyl makes these tiles rigid, durable and easy to install. Their unique design tricks the eye into seeing 2 separate square tiles rather than one big 2 ft. x 4 ft. tile. The Stratford White Feather-Light Ceiling Panels are not at all like the old mineral fiber tiles you've used in the past and that's a good thing. They don't generate dust, they're unaffected by moisture, they don't harbor mold and they're easy to cut. Their white finish is bright, pure and easy to clean. Place them in your ceiling grid and you'll be thrilled by the way the Stratford improves the look of your room.
  • Made throughout from durable 0.013 in. thick white virgin vinyl material; these panels will not rust, stain, corrode or be affected by water
  • Designer beauty, only better! No special tools or skills required for installation
  • Impact resistant ceiling panels are 2 ft. x 4 ft. (actual size 23.75 in. x 47.75 in.) and each panel covers an 8 sq. ft. area
  • ASTM-E84 Class A fire rated, IAPMO UES ER-310 recognized compliant with 2006, 2009 and 2012 International Building Code and FDA compliant for food preparation areas
  • As a general rule, Ceilume Ceiling Tiles and Panels will not be affected by ceiling level temperatures up to 120 °F; in some installations involving halogen lights, metal heat registers, and radiant heat sources (wood stoves, kitchen ovens, etc.), localized ceiling and ceiling tile temperatures can be much higher than anticipated; please contact the manufacturer for specific advice if your installation has any of these special conditions
  • Excellent for remodeling or new construction, these elegant decorative ceiling panels trim easily with scissors or aviation snips for can light openings, etc
  • GREENGUARD Gold Certified for Indoor Air Quality and Children and Schools and fully recyclable

USG setting-type joint compounds provide faster finishing of drywall interiors, even under slow drying conditions. Rapid chemical hardening and low shrinkage permit same-day finishing and usually next-day decoration. USG Sheetrock Brand Easy Sand 90 Joint Compound features an exceptional bond; virtually unaffected by humidity extremes. It is ideal for laminating double-layer systems, particularly fire-rated assemblies, and for adhering gypsum panels to above-grade concrete surfaces. May also be used for surface texturing and for filling, smoothing and finishing interior above-grade concrete. Note: Setting-type joint compounds should not be used for skim coating due to dryout concerns.

Built for the pros, the HandiFoam FR (HFO) is designed to fill and insulate large voids and surfaces. HandiFoam's excellent adhesion properties create a continuous air barrier which completes the building envelope, resulting in improved indoor air quality and lower heating and cooling costs. Designed to be used with the Handi-Gun and the patented ColorWise Temperature Warning nozzles to effectively seal and insulate projects of all sizes. The ColorWise Temperature Warning nozzles change from clear to blue as a visual indication that the foam is too cold and should not be dispensed until properly conditioned. Title: 4.75 Gal. Airport Grade Asphalt Driveway Filler Sealant
Body (HTML):
The Latex-ite Airport Grade Driveway Filler Sealer is an asphalt emulsion-based low-VOC formula designed to beautify and protect your blacktop driveway. This non-skid sealer fills hairline cracks (1/8 in. or less) and is polymer fortified for added durability. Helpful hints before you seal your driveway: 1) Figure out how many pails you need by using the coverage information below in the bullet points. The size and condition of your pavement will dictate how many you need. 2) Flip pails overnight prior to application (it will be much easier to mix in the morning and will ensure consistency). 3) Do the project all at one time without starting and stopping. 4) Check the weather and make sure no rain is forecasted and it is at least 55 degrees F at night (a cold driveway will not allow the sealer to cure properly). 5) Check latexite.com for further tips and how-to videos. (Please note: if product is not available to order in your area, it is due to nighttime temperatures.).
  • Coverage on smooth/previously sealed driveways: 400 to 500 sq. ft.
  • Coverage on rough/porous or unsealed driveways: 300 to 400 sq. ft.
  • Remember: clean your driveway thoroughly so sealer will bond, and make sure you do not seal when it is cold outside; it must be at least 55 degrees at night for sealer to properly cure and last
  • Do not seal in early spring or late fall as the sealer will not last - it will not cure properly and may track
  • Ideal for sealing hairline cracks in asphalt/blacktop driveways and walkways
  • Polymer fortified for strength and flexibility
  • EZ-stir, non-skid formula saves time during application
  • Low VOC, coal tar free, PAH compliant, soap and water cleanup
  • Backed by 4-year warranty - not prorated

Body (HTML):
We took our signature #1-selling shingle, Timberline HD and transformed it by strengthening the common bond and creating the industry's largest nailing zone.
